name: cropped legend
fixture_spec: At final submission size, crop the right edge so at least one legend key or label is incomplete while the original-size render remains available.
expected_finding: The legend is visibly cut off and category decoding is incomplete.
auto_fix_scope: increase output width or right margin
move the unchanged legend inside available canvas
reduce legend spacing without changing category mappings
confirmation_reason: Canvas, margin, and legend-placement changes are visual-only when mappings remain unchanged.
pass_criteria: review names the clipped legend
revised render is reopened at final size
all legend keys and labels are complete
no data or mapping change is made

name: missing continuous colorbar
fixture_spec: Render a plot whose code maps a continuous variable to colour but suppresses the colorbar/guide.
expected_finding: A continuous colour encoding is present in code, but the rendered image provides no colorbar, limits, direction, or units needed to decode it.
auto_fix_scope: restore the existing continuous guide
make the existing scale title, ticks, and units visible
reallocate layout space for the unchanged colorbar
confirmation_reason: Restoring a guide for an already-declared mapping does not change data or scale semantics.
pass_criteria: review identifies the missing colorbar
restored colorbar matches the code mapping exactly
final-size labels and ticks are legible

name: overlapping labels
fixture_spec: Force at least three text labels to overlap each other or obscure primary marks at final submission size.
expected_finding: Labels collide or occlude marks, preventing unambiguous label-to-mark assignment.
auto_fix_scope: repel labels
adjust label positions and leader lines
increase canvas or panel spacing
reduce nonessential labels while preserving the declared labelled set
confirmation_reason: Placement and spacing are visual-only when the selected labels and their identities are preserved.
forbidden_changes: hide a required label without disclosure
pass_criteria: review identifies specific overlap
revised labels remain attached to the correct marks
final-size render has no material overlap

name: font too small at submission size
fixture_spec: Create a render that is readable at native zoom but whose axis, legend, or annotation text becomes materially unreadable at the declared final physical size.
expected_finding: At least one necessary label, tick, legend entry, or annotation cannot be read reliably at final size.
auto_fix_scope: increase typography
reduce unnecessary precision or decorative text
increase panel or canvas size
reflow or move legend
confirmation_reason: Typography and layout changes are visual-only when labels and values remain unchanged.
forbidden_changes: round values in a way that changes interpretation
pass_criteria: review explicitly distinguishes native-size from final-size readability
all primary evidence and decoding text are legible after revision

name: inconsistent category colours across panels
fixture_spec: Use the same named category in two panels but assign visibly different colours through separate manual scales.
expected_finding: The same semantic category changes colour between panels, creating a false identity change and comparison burden.
auto_fix_scope: apply one named category-to-colour map across panels
collect a shared legend only when scale meanings are equivalent
retain separate legends when meanings differ
confirmation_reason: Harmonising an explicitly identical category mapping is a visual consistency fix when identities are preserved.
pass_criteria: review verifies category semantics from code before harmonising
same categories use the same colour across panels
non-equivalent mappings are not merged

name: red-green colour-only encoding
fixture_spec: Encode two critical categories or directions only with red and green, with no shape, pattern, outline, or direct label redundancy.
expected_finding: Critical groups rely exclusively on a red-green distinction and lack a redundant decoding channel.
auto_fix_scope: replace with a colour-vision-deficiency-safe palette while preserving identities
add shape, outline, pattern, or direct labels
check grayscale separability
confirmation_reason: Palette and redundant-channel changes are visual-only when group identities and mapped values stay fixed.
pass_criteria: review names the accessibility failure
revision remains decodable under simulated colour-vision deficiency or grayscale
legend identities are unchanged

name: semantically wrong heatmap midpoint
fixture_spec: Render a diverging heatmap centred at zero although the audited values and declared estimand require a different meaningful reference, or use a nonzero midpoint where zero is the predeclared neutral value.
expected_finding: The colour neutral point does not correspond to the declared scientific reference and visually reverses or exaggerates departures around the wrong baseline.
auto_fix_scope: recommend the scientifically justified midpoint
recommend a sequential scale when no meaningful midpoint exists
rerender only after approval
confirmation_reason: Changing the midpoint or scale family changes the semantic encoding and may alter the apparent scientific conclusion.
forbidden_changes: infer the correct midpoint from pixels alone
pass_criteria: review refuses a pixels-only midpoint claim
code and data establish the intended neutral reference
confirmation precedes any midpoint or scale-family change
caption declares the final scale semantics

name: exclude Xenium group QR advertisement
asset: assets/source_archive/02_绘图小技巧2026/assets/001_最新Nature杂志同款Xenium高精度HE图片绘制（文末有交流群）/007.png
fixture_spec: Open the source asset and combine visible QR structure with article context and deterministic QR metadata.
expected_finding: The image is a WeChat group advertisement dominated by a QR code, not a scientific result, intermediate plot, or tissue image.
auto_fix_scope: classify as promotion_or_qr
exclude from recipe-preview candidates without modifying the source snapshot
confirmation_reason: Excluding a visually confirmed promotional QR from scientific previews is deterministic curation, not a scientific transformation.
forbidden_changes: delete or modify the immutable source asset
describe QR content as scientific evidence
pass_criteria: role equals promotion_or_qr
reviewed equals true
asset hash is absent from curated previews
scientific Xenium images remain available

expected_finding: The image is a personal contact QR code and contains no scientific panel or result encoding.
auto_fix_scope: classify as promotion_or_qr
exclude from recipe-preview candidates without modifying the source snapshot
confirmation_reason: Excluding a visually confirmed personal QR from scientific previews is deterministic curation.
forbidden_changes: delete or modify the immutable source asset
describe QR content as scientific evidence
pass_criteria: role equals promotion_or_qr
reviewed equals true
asset hash is absent from curated previews
